name: P01b — Pre-Router · NPS · v1.0
description: FIX v2: COALESCE força valores não-NULL — n8n Postgres descartava row com todos NULLs. Lookup agora retorna id=0/has_pending=false quando sem pending NPS.

parameters.query:
=SELECT 
  COALESCE(pf.id, 0) AS id,
  COALESCE(pf.status, 'no_pending') AS status,
  pf.nps_score,
  CASE WHEN pf.id IS NULL THEN false ELSE true END AS has_pending
FROM (VALUES (1)) AS dummy(d)
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT id, status, nps_score
  FROM public.patient_feedback
  WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $json.tenant_id }}'
    AND patient_phone = '{{ $json.patient_phone }}'
    AND status IN ('pending', 'awaiting_followup')
    AND sent_at > now() - interval '24 hours'
  ORDER BY sent_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
) pf ON true

=UPDATE public.patient_feedback
SET nps_score = {{ $json.score }},
    responded_at = now(),
    status = CASE WHEN {{ $json.score }} <= 6 THEN 'awaiting_followup' ELSE 'closed' END
WHERE id = {{ $json.feedback_id }}
RETURNING status, nps_score

value.mensagem:
Obrigada pela nota 🙏
O que podemos melhorar pra próxima vez?
Obrigada pelo retorno! Que bom que correu bem 💜

parameters.query:
=UPDATE public.patient_feedback
SET feedback_text = '{{ ($('When Called').item.json.mensagem || '').replaceAll("'", "''") }}',
    responded_at = now(),
    status = 'closed'
WHERE id = {{ $('Lookup Pending NPS').item.json.id }}
